title: Meta Title for link previews outside of Monday.com
excerpt: When sharing the url link to a board, can the meta title be populated with the board name?  When sharing links to boards in Teams it autofills with “Welcome to monday.com”.

posts.author: kpagels (Kristin Pagels Quinlan)
posts.cookedHtml: When sharing the url link to a board, can the meta title be populated with the board name? When sharing links to boards in Teams it autofills with “Welcome to monday.com”.
